betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Focusing Electromagnets§f

§aSteer and focus the particle beam.§f

The §bMagnesium Diboride Accelerator Electromagnet§f (qmd:accelerator_magnet:1) is one variant of the accelerator magnet family. Placed on the long sides of an accelerator multiblock to steer and focus the particle beam. Multiple magnet tiers exist (variants differ by metadata).

§6Recipe Ingredients§f:
§b•§f §bMagnesium Diboride Alloy Ingot§f (nuclearcraft)
§b•§f §bStainless Steel Ingot§f (qmd)
§b•§f §bTough Alloy Ingot§f (nuclearcraft)

§6Key Component Materials (depth-2)§f:
§b•§f §bFerroboron Alloy Ingot§f
§b•§f §bLithium Ingot§f / §bLithium Cube§f / §bLithium Dust§f
§b•§f §bLithium Powder§f (hbm)
§b•§f §bStainless Steel Ingf chain (qmd + nuclearcraft)

§6Source Code Reference§f:
§b•§f Block class: lach_01298.qmd.accelerator.tile.TileAcceleratorMagnet
§b•§f Magnet metadata values control tier (Copper, MgB2, etc.)

§6Strategic Role§f:
§b•§f §eEssential§f for any ring accelerator or beam-routing setup
§b•§f Different magnet types have different field strengths

§eWiki§f: https://github.com/Lach01298/QMD/wiki
